prospects.name: Kostya Rapina
prospects.message: Hi Kostya, the approach Powerkh is taking with Powerkh's UK expansion is really interesting. I'd love to stay connected on VDC Construction trends.

prospects.name: Han Hoang
prospects.message: Hi Han, the approach THE BIM FACTORY is taking with THE BIM FACTORY's C-DRIVE methodology is really interesting. I'd love to stay connected on VDC Consulting trends.

prospects.name: Ajith Menon
prospects.message: Hi Ajith, the approach BIMAGE Consulting is taking with BIMAGE Consulting's 400+ projects is really interesting. I'd love to stay connected on VDC Services trends.

prospects.name: Tristen Magallanes
prospects.message: Hi Tristen, DPR Construction's WND Ventures caught my attention. I'm exploring similar challenges in Construction Tech. Mind if we connect?

prospects.name: David Antony
prospects.message: Hi David, I've been following Flatworld Solutions's work — especially Flatworld Solutions's AI steering. Would love to connect and exchange ideas on BPO + VDC and exchange ideas on BPO + VDC.
